_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Astra WhatsApp Bot Stable
author: danimaru-ze
description: WhatsApp Bot egg yang ultra-fleksibel dan powerfull. Mendukung XVFB Display, Dynamic Packages, dan Git Auto-Update. Optimized untuk Bot WhatsApp modern dengan branding AstraHost.
startup:
if [ -f package.json ]; then if [ ! -d node_modules ] || [ package.json -nt node_modules ]; then echo -e "
[DEPENDENCY CHECK] Dependencies not found or outdated"; echo "[INSTALL] Installing dependencies..."; npm install --production; echo -e "[INSTALL] Dependencies installed successfully!
"; fi; fi; if [ -n "{{NODE_PACKAGES}}" ]; then echo "[INSTALL] Installing extra packages: {{NODE_PACKAGES}}..."; npm install {{NODE_PACKAGES}}; fi; if [[ {{AUTO_UPDATE}} == "1" ]] && [[ -d .git ]]; then echo -e "[AUTO-UPDATE] Checking for updates..."; git pull && echo "[AUTO-UPDATE] Installing updated dependencies..." && npm install --production; echo -e "[AUTO-UPDATE] Update complete!
"; fi; echo "[STARTUP] Starting WhatsApp Bot..."; echo ""; exec {{STARTUP_CMD}}

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Astra WhatsApp Bot - Installation Script
# Optimized for AstraHost images

set -e

RED='\033[0;31m'
GREEN='\033[0;32m'
YELLOW='\033[1;33m'
BLUE='\033[0;34m'
NC='\033[0m' # No Color

echo -e "${BLUE}"
echo "========================================="
echo "   Astra WhatsApp Bot Installation"
echo "========================================="
echo -e "${NC}"

# Create and navigate to server directory
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

echo -e "${YELLOW}[1/2] Checking installation mode...${NC}"

# Check if user uploaded files manually
if [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "true" ] || [ "${USER_UPLOAD}" == "1" ]; then
    echo -e "${BLUE}User upload mode enabled${NC}"
    
    if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
        echo -e "${YELLOW}Found package.json, installing dependencies...${NC}"
        npm install --production
        echo -e "${GREEN}✓ Dependencies installed${NC}"
    fi
    exit 0
fi

# Validate Git repository
if [ -z "${GIT_ADDRESS}" ]; then
    echo -e "${RED}ERROR: GIT_ADDRESS is empty!${NC}"
    exit 1
fi

# Configure Git credentials
if [ -z "${USERNAME}" ] || [ -z "${ACCESS_TOKEN}" ]; then
    echo -e "${BLUE}Using anonymous Git clone${NC}"
else
    echo -e "${BLUE}Using authenticated Git clone${NC}"
    GIT_ADDRESS="https://${USERNAME}:${ACCESS_TOKEN}@$(echo ${GIT_ADDRESS} | cut -d/ -f3-)"
fi

echo -e "${YELLOW}[2/2] Cloning repository...${NC}"
if [ -z "${BRANCH}" ]; then
    git clone ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
else
    git clone --single-branch --branch ${BRANCH} ${GIT_ADDRESS} .
fi

# Install dependencies
if [ -f /mnt/server/package.json ]; then
    npm install --production
fi

echo -e "${GREEN}Installation Complete!${NC}"
exit 0

variables.name: Git Repository URL
variables.description: Git repository URL to clone (e.g., https://github.com/username/wabot)

variables.name: Git Branch
variables.description: Branch to clone (leave empty for default branch)

variables.name: Git Access Token
variables.description: Git access token for private repositories (optional)

variables.name: Startup Command
variables.description: Command to start the bot (e.g., npm start, node index.js)

variables.name: Extra Node Packages
variables.description: List of extra npm packages to install on startup (e.g., ffmpeg-static sharp)

variables.name: Enable XVFB (Virtual Display)
variables.description: Enable for bots that need a browser display (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: Auto Update on Restart
variables.description: Auto pull latest changes from Git when server restarts (1 = enabled, 0 = disabled)

variables.name: User Upload Mode
variables.description: Enable if you want to upload bot files manually (true/false)
